items.title: The Exorcist
items.why_helps: Works for adrenaline release when you want intense suspense.
items.description: When a mysterious entity possesses a young girl, her mother seeks the help of two Catholic priests to save her life.

items.title: The Conjuring
items.why_helps: Works for adrenaline release when you want intense suspense.
items.description: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren work to help a family terrorized by a dark presence in their farmhouse.

items.title: Hereditary
items.why_helps: Offers emotional depth and perspective through grounded human stories.
items.description: A grieving family is haunted by tragic and disturbing occurrences.

items.title: A Nightmare on Elm Street

items.description: Teenager Nancy Thompson must uncover the dark truth concealed by her parents after she and her friends become targets of the spirit of a serial killer with a bladed glove in their dreams, in which if they die, it kills them in rea...

items.title: Halloween
items.why_helps: Works for adrenaline release when you want intense suspense.
items.description: Fifteen years after murdering his sister on Halloween night 1963, Michael Myers escapes from a mental hospital and returns to the small town of Haddonfield, Illinois, to kill again.

items.title: It (2017)
items.why_helps: Helps reset mood with lightness, humor, and social warmth.
items.description: Much like how Pennywise returns every 27 years to cause havoc, they're seemingly returning to Stephen King's It every 2 years to talk about the most recent screen-version of the story.

items.title: The Shining
items.why_helps: Offers emotional depth and perspective through grounded human stories.
items.description: A family heads to an isolated hotel for the winter, where a sinister presence influences the father into violence. At the same time, his psychic son sees horrifying forebodings from both the past and the future.

items.title: Insidious
items.why_helps: Works for adrenaline release when you want intense suspense.
items.description: A family looks to prevent evil spirits from trapping their comatose child in a realm called The Further.

items.title: Paranormal Activity
items.why_helps: Works for adrenaline release when you want intense suspense.
items.description: After moving into a suburban home, a couple becomes increasingly disturbed by a nightly demonic presence.

items.title: Scream
items.why_helps: Works for adrenaline release when you want intense suspense.
items.description: In the small town of Woodsboro, California, a masked killer known as Ghostface begins murdering high school students, and a group of friends must use their knowledge of horror movies to unmask the killer.

items.title: Naruto Shippuden
items.why_helps: Warm visual storytelling that is often accessible and uplifting.
items.description: Naruto Uzumaki, is a loud, hyperactive, adolescent ninja who constantly searches for approval and recognition, as well as to become Hokage, who is acknowledged as the leader and strongest of all ninja in the village.

items.title: One Piece
items.why_helps: Warm visual storytelling that is often accessible and uplifting.
items.description: Monkey D. Luffy, a pirate with rubber powers, forms the Straw Hat crew and sails the Grand Line, battling rivals and the World Government on a quest for the legendary treasure One Piece and the title of Pirate King.

items.title: Attack on Titan
items.why_helps: Warm visual storytelling that is often accessible and uplifting.
items.description: In a world where humanity shelters behind towering walls from man-eating Titans, a determined teen joins the elite Survey Corps to fight the giants and uncover the secrets of their origin.

items.title: Death Note
items.why_helps: Warm visual storytelling that is often accessible and uplifting.
items.description: An intelligent high school student goes on a secret crusade to eliminate criminals from the world after discovering a notebook capable of killing anyone whose name is written into it.

items.title: Demon Slayer (Kimetsu no Yaiba)
items.why_helps: Warm visual storytelling that is often accessible and uplifting.
items.description: A family is attacked by demons and only two members survive - Tanjiro and his sister Nezuko, who is turning into a demon slowly. Tanjiro sets out to become a demon slayer to avenge his family and cure his sister.

items.title: My Hero Academia
items.why_helps: Warm visual storytelling that is often accessible and uplifting.
items.description: A superhero-admiring boy enrolls in a prestigious hero academy and learns what it really means to be a hero, after the strongest superhero grants him his own powers.

items.title: Jujutsu Kaisen
items.why_helps: Warm visual storytelling that is often accessible and uplifting.
items.description: A boy swallows a cursed talisman - the finger of a demon - and becomes cursed himself. He enters a shaman's school to be able to locate the demon's other body parts and thus exorcise himself.

items.title: Bleach
items.why_helps: Warm visual storytelling that is often accessible and uplifting.
items.description: High school student Ichigo Kurosaki, who has the ability to see ghosts, gains soul reaper powers from Rukia Kuchiki and sets out to save the world from "Hollows".

items.title: Dragon Ball Z
items.why_helps: Warm visual storytelling that is often accessible and uplifting.
items.description: With the help of the powerful Dragonballs, a team of fighters led by the saiyan warrior Goku defend the planet earth from extraterrestrial enemies.

items.title: Dark
items.why_helps: Engages strategic thinking with tension, stakes, and investigation.
items.description: A family saga with a supernatural twist, set in a German town where the disappearance of two young children exposes the relationships among four families.

items.title: Stranger Things
items.why_helps: Offers emotional depth and perspective through grounded human stories.
items.description: In 1980s Indiana, a group of young friends witness supernatural forces and secret government exploits. As they search for answers, the children unravel a series of extraordinary mysteries.

items.title: The Last of Us
items.why_helps: Brings momentum and energy with high-stakes sequences.
items.description: After a global pandemic destroys civilization, a hardened survivor takes charge of a 14-year-old girl who may be humanity's last hope.

items.title: Money Heist (La Casa de Papel)
items.why_helps: Brings momentum and energy with high-stakes sequences.
items.description: An unusual group of robbers attempt to carry out the most perfect robbery in Spanish history - stealing 2.4 billion euros from the Royal Mint of Spain.

items.title: Wednesday
items.why_helps: Helps reset mood with lightness, humor, and social warmth.
items.description: Follows Wednesday Addams' years as a student, when she attempts to master her emerging psychic ability, thwart a killing spree, and solve the mystery that embroiled her parents.

items.title: Peaky Blinders
items.why_helps: Engages strategic thinking with tension, stakes, and investigation.
items.description: A gangster family epic set in 1900s England, centering on a gang who sew razor blades in the peaks of their caps, and their fierce boss Tommy Shelby.

items.title: The Crown
items.why_helps: Can inspire through real-life resilience and transformation.
items.description: Follows the political rivalries and romances of Queen Elizabeth II's reign and the events that shaped Britain for the second half of the 20th century.
